description: Recto and verso: Letter to the Nagid. In Judaeo-Arabic. Politely disputing a quotation used in his sermon on the preceding Saturday, the topic of which was that even the greatest Talmudic scholar, Rabbi ʿAqiba, was a sinner in his youth. The sender suggests in a postscript that the ʿAqiba b. Yosef mentioned in this context in Bava Meṣiʿa (though Goitein's note card points out that his citation is actually incorrect, and it should be ʿArakhin 16b) must have been a different ʿAqiba. (S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2:158–59, 553) EMS
description_he: מכתב לנגיד: בנימוס חולק על ציטוט בדרשת השבת בנושא ר' עקיבא כחוטא בצעירותו. מציע שה'עקיבא בן יוסף' בבבא מציעא הוא עקיבא אחר.
